description: FEAT-006 T3 — deterministic schema-merge. Add a key/path-level draft-07 3-way merge mergeSchema(base, ours, theirs) -> {merged, conflicts[]}: base = the base-stamped as-installed body (getObject), ours = the installed dest schema, theirs = the catalog source schema. Wire it into the update flow at the locally-modified / both-diverged branch (replacing TASK-034's refuse-and-report): auto-apply the merged schema when the conflict set is empty; on a non-empty conflict set leave the schema unmodified and hand the typed set to the resolver (TASK-037). Depends on TASK-035; governed by DEC-0017.
acceptance_criteria: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
